title: SOCIAL SECURITY ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF SILETZ INDIANS SOCIAL SECURITY ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Facilitates face-to-face video conferences with Social Security. Assists with replacement cards, name changes, retirement, SSI, SSDI, and other concerns. 201 SE Swan Avenue Siletz, OR 97380 Eligibility: Unrestricted; includes tribal members and the general public Hours: Thursdays 1pm-4pm Email (541) 444-8222 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 444-8222 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Social Security card and related documents AREA SERVED: Lincoln County Services: Benefits and Services Assistance * Social Security Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - HEAD START INFORMATION SERVICES - TRIBAL MEMBER SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF SILETZ INDIANS
